project_type: Full-stack VPN panel: Go backend + Vue 3 frontend (admin + portal)
test_framework: vitest for frontend, go test for backend
build_command: cd panel/web/admin && npm install && npx vue-tsc --noEmit && npx vite build
test_command: cd panel/web/admin && npx vitest run; cd ../shared && npx vitest run
verification_instructions: 1. Run frontend type-check: cd panel/web/admin && npx vue-tsc --noEmit. 2. Run vite build: npx vite build. 3. Run tests: npx vitest run
setup_instructions: cd panel/web/admin && npm install; cd ../shared && npm install
environment_constraints: COMMON_DEPENDENCIES network mode. NPM packages installable. No Docker daemon available for testing.
contribution_requirements: New branch for new PR. Do not update old PRs. Changes must be update-friendly (no breaking changes for existing configs). Mobile responsive.
key_patterns: Uses shared useI18n composable for locale. Pinia stores for state. KorisUI components (KTabs, KButton, KInput, KSelect, etc.). CSS custom properties for theming. RTL support via dir attribute.
directory_structure: panel/web/admin/src/ - Vue admin SPA. panel/web/shared/ - shared composables/components. panel/web/portal/ - customer portal. panel/internal/ - Go backend. node/ - node agent Go code. scripts/ - install scripts. Root has deploy.sh, install.sh, node-install.sh, koris.sh.
